entity.summary: Decentralized exchange and liquidity-aggregation protocol originating from Kyber Network. KyberSwap evolved through Classic and Elastic protocol generations and remained active after a November 2023 security incident affecting Elastic liquidity pools.
entity.notes: Entity-level umbrella record for KyberSwap's interface, aggregator and liquidity protocols. KyberDMM and KyberSwap Elastic are treated as lifecycle versions, not separate entities.

events.title: KyberSwap entered public operation
events.description: Kyber Network published a user guide for the newly launched KyberSwap interface in August 2018, providing an early public operational marker for the exchange product.
events.notes: The marker follows contemporaneous official KyberSwap materials rather than a later DMM rebrand.

events.title: KyberSwap Elastic liquidity pools were affected by a security incident
events.description: A November 2023 security incident affected KyberSwap Elastic liquidity pools. KyberSwap later published a postmortem and established a treasury grant program for eligible affected users.
events.notes: The incident affected Elastic pools but did not terminate the wider KyberSwap service.

evidence.title: Guide: How to Convert Tokens on KyberSwap
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous official guide describing the newly launched KyberSwap interface.

evidence.title: Tech Update (August 20, 2018)
evidence.notes: Official update documenting early KyberSwap interface and trading capabilities.

evidence.title: KyberSwap Elastic Exploit Post Mortem and User Support
evidence.notes: Primary postmortem giving the 2023-11-22 incident date and impact.

evidence.title: KyberSwap Treasury Grant Program
evidence.notes: Primary source describing affected-asset categories and the support program.

evidence.title: KyberSwap official application
evidence.notes: Current official application confirming continued operation.

evidence.title: KyberSwap archived homepage index
evidence.notes: Archive index retained for historical website continuity.
